channel.title: Mental
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Mental, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cravings, fatigue, and mood swings: what to eat each cycle phase
item.description: Permission to eat carbs and chocolate during menstrual cycle.

item.title: In need of sun, rest and relaxation? Try this Mexican hotspot
item.description: Playa del Carmen offers a premier resort destination in the Riviera Maya.

item.title: How women can prevent injury while weightlifting in their 40s and beyond
item.description: Certain fractures become much more common during perimenopause.

item.title: Is this the part of endometriosis treatment we've been missing?
item.description: Research reveals how endometriosis changes the brain.

item.title: Study of 450k diets finds specific eating habit linked to cancer prevention
item.description: Yet another benefit of this particular dietary pattern.

item.title: Understanding bereavement after a loss
item.description: Coping with the painful instance of losing a loved one.

item.title: What you need to know about Cushing's syndrome
item.description: Understanding the effects of cortisol and other hormones on the body.

item.title: How the 'Let Them' theory can change your relationships
item.description: Letting go of control may improve unpredictable relationship dynamics.

item.title: Double texting: what it is and when to do it
item.description: Navigating the dilemma of sending a second text after no reply.

item.title: How to sober up fast: 10 healthy ways
item.description: Safe methods to recover after drinking alcohol.
